name: Sauteed Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. On waxed paper, combine the flour and pepper. Coat the chicken lightly with the flour mixture.
2. In a skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Cook the chicken for 10 minutes or until browned, turning occasionally. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
3. Spoon off any excess fat from the skillet.
4. Return the skillet to medium-low heat. Combine the tomato soup and water in the skillet. Bring to a simmer, then return the chicken to the skillet.
5. Cover and cook over low heat for 5 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink, stirring occasionally. Serve hot over noodles. Garnish with fresh basil if desired and serve with grated Parmesan cheese, if desired. Makes 4 servings.
